# grandMA2 Manual Vault — GitHub-browsable mirror

You are on the **`github-browse`** branch: an **auto-generated, read-only mirror** of `main` where
every Obsidian `[[wikilink]]` has been rewritten to a relative markdown link, so cross-references
resolve when you click them here on GitHub.

> ⚠️ **Do not edit this branch.** It is force-rebuilt from `main` on every push by
> [`.github/workflows/sync.yml`](../blob/main/.github/workflows/sync.yml). Make changes on
> [`main`](../tree/main) instead.

## Start reading

- **[000 Map of Content](000%20Map%20of%20Content.md)** — top-level index
- **[000 Keyword Index](000%20Keyword%20Index.md)** — all CLI keywords
- **[000 Key Index](000%20Key%20Index.md)** — all console keys and buttons

## Other ways to read this vault

| Surface | Best for | Link |
|---|---|---|
| **Web (Quartz)** | search + interactive graph | [thisis-romar.github.io/grandma2-manual-vault](https://thisis-romar.github.io/grandma2-manual-vault) |
| **Obsidian** | native graph, backlinks, editing | clone [`main`](../tree/main) and open as a vault |
| **GitHub (here)** | quick clickable browsing | you're here |

---

Source: the [grandMA2 User Manual](https://help.malighting.com/grandMA2/en/help/), extracted by
`scripts/extract.js`. Generated mirror — see [`main`](../tree/main) for the source and
[`CLAUDE.md`](../blob/main/CLAUDE.md) for conventions.
